email.title: Vwala Open Energie – Sign In
email.description: Enter your e-mail address. A one-time password (OTP) will be sent to you.

data_description.email: An e-mail address to link your API key.

api_key.title: Vwala Open Energie – API Key
api_key.description: Paste your existing long-lived API key. This key was created via the OTP flow or the Vwala website.

data_description.api_key: Your long-lived Vwala Open Energie API key.

otp.title: Vwala Open Energie – Verify OTP
otp.description:
A verification code has been sent to **{email}**.
Enter the code below. The code is valid for **{remaining} seconds**.

meter_setup.title: Vwala Open Energie – Meter Configuration
meter_setup.description: Enter your postal code and select your meter type and tariff type.

data_description.tariff_type: Single rate (enkelvoudig), day/night (tweevoudig), or exclusive night meter (nachtmeter).

select_provider.title: Vwala Open Energie – Distribution Net Provider
select_provider.description: Select your distribution net provider for postal code **{postal_code}**.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Vwala Open Energie API. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_otp: Invalid or expired verification code. Please try again.
error.otp_expired: The verification code has expired (more than 2 minutes). Go back and request a new code.
error.api_key_failed: Could not create an API key. Please try again later.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please check the key and try again.
error.no_providers: No distribution net providers found for this postal code.
error.invalid_postal_code: Invalid postal code. Please enter a valid 4-digit Belgian postal code.
